items.setting: You're being trained to show students how to use the campus library's printing services.
sentences: Welcome to the help desk.
First, select the printer from your computer.
Check the paper tray supply before you start.
You can use your student ID for any other services.
You can pay at the payment kiosk if you prefer that method.
The help desk is available if you need assistance.
When you are ready, simply select print from your computer and retrieve your document.
Milk and yogurt are in the dairy section.
Bread is freshly baked on site every day.
We have a huge selection of fresh fruits and vegetables.
This flyer has all our weekly deals and special discounts.
The checkout counter is located at the front of the store.
If you need help while learning, please don't hesitate to ask a full-time store associate.
Download our app and sign up for our newsletter to stay informed about upcoming sales.
Check your inbox for new messages.
Select Compose to write your email.
Select from your contacts list to add recipients to your note.
Review sent items to confirm your messages were delivered.
Use folders to organize your correspondence efficiently.
Set up a few topical filters to manage incoming communications.
To be safe, remember to log out to keep your electronic mail secure in our system.

items.setting: You are learning to guide new students on how to use tools in a woodworking class.
sentences: Welcome to the woodshop.
This toolbox contains everything you should need.
You will learn to use your saw in our classes.
Your screwdriver can be used with all of our carpentry machines.
All wood will need to be smooth, so use the sandpaper provided.
Use only what is needed so that your supplies last all quarter.
Before you leave the classroom, be sure you put all your tools back into the toolbox.

items.setting: You're learning to assist visitors at a university open house.
sentences: Welcome to our campus tour.
The enrollment office is straight ahead.
Next door, you will see the library.
The cafeteria has many meal options available.
The university lecture halls are located over here.
If you have any questions, please stop by the information desk.
Lastly, please also remember to check the event schedule at the entrance.
You can buy tickets at the entrance.
The Rose Garden is beautiful this season.
The pond is a popular spot for sitting and relaxing.
Visit the greenhouse for a variety of exotic plants.
Check the bulletin board for information about guided tours.
The gift shop offers souvenirs and gardening books at reasonable prices.
Enjoy your lunch at our cafe, which has outdoor seating overlooking the grounds.
Enter your name and student ID number.
Browse the course catalog to choose your classes.
You can use the schedule planner tool to avoid time conflicts.
If a class is already full, a pop-up message will appear.
Contact the instructor to see if more seats can be added.
You can still add or drop classes up until the second week of the new semester.
For your records, print out a list of your classes or email a copy to yourself.
The computer lab has free Wi-Fi access.
The reading room is a quiet space for patrons.
The children's section has books and activities for kids.
The reference desk can provide assistance for research projects.
Study rooms can be reserved for group work and other meetings.
Library staff are available for help finding resources here or at other locations.
If you are looking for other specific locations and services, please use our guide.
You will see birds living in their treetop homes.
This space houses animals from Africa.
Many reptiles live here, including snakes, lizards and turtles.
Brightly colored butterflies are found in this peaceful area.
Staff are available to explain the displays in more detail.
Guides lead nature walks, highlighting native species and protected habitats.
To explore locations, trail paths and key features, you can download the map for free.
The cafe offers refreshments and snacks.
Rooms can be reserved for group gatherings.
The art studio offers classes and workshops every day.
The library provides books, learning resources and more.
The gymnasium is used for sports and fitness activities.
Staff are available for assistance with facility reservations.
Because this is a new center, help is available at no additional cost.
You can select your section and seat.
We have many different snacks and drinks for sale.
Family toilets are located by each of the sections.
Tickets and season passes are available near the front gate.
The visitor entrance to the stadium is through here.
Should you have questions about maps or event times, there are staff that can assist you.
You can download the map to your phone or tablet if you need any help navigating.

items.setting: You are learning how to give the weather report for the University radio station.
sentences: Today will be sunny and clear.
Expect cloudy conditions in the afternoon.
Rain showers are predicted for the evening.
Temperatures will range from 15 to 20 degrees Celsius.
Winds will be light around 10 kilometers per hour.
Keep an umbrella handy for possible evening rain.
When you need a weather update, check out our new online app, now available all day.
Laptops are located in this aisle.
We have a wide assortment of headphones.
To pick up an online order, go to the checkout counter.
Get a phone case for free if you purchase a smartphone from us.
Sign up for a membership to receive member only discounts.
You can return unused products for a full refund within one week of purchase.
We are here to help if you need advice on which model is most suitable for your needs.
